THE ATTACHED GARAGE TO A HOUSE NEAR HOPE KANSAS WAS COMPLETELY DESTROYED. A SEPARATE WORK SHOP NEAR THE HOUSE ALSO SUSTAINED MAJOR DAMAGE. AN ENCLOSED TRAILER WAS TOSSED IN THE AIR AND DEPOSITED ON ITS SIDE 30 FEET AWAY. MANY HEAVY OBJECTS THROUGHOUT THE YARD WERE ALSO THROWN ABOUT 100 YARDS AS A RESULT OF 90 TO 100 MPH WINDS.
